title: Crispy Chicken Skewers
description: A delicious Japanese-inspired dish featuring crispy chicken skewers, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Cut the chicken breast into 1-inch pieces and place in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, cornstarch, crispy rice, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic powder, and salt.
Add the dry mixture to the chicken and toss to coat.
Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes.
Thread 5-6 pieces of chicken onto each skewer.
Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the skewers to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Transfer the skewers to the oven and bake for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
